econometric_sources.wage_floor: ILOSTAT — Pakistan Labour Force Survey 2022, median monthly earnings by occupation
econometric_sources.employer_demand: World Bank Enterprise Survey (WBES) Pakistan 2022 — % firms reporting difficulty finding qualified workers by sector
econometric_sources.sector_growth: ILOSTAT — Pakistan sectoral employment growth rate 2019-2022

opportunities.title: Mobile Repair Technician
opportunities.honest_description: Strong demand in dense urban markets where quick repair is cheaper than replacement. Work quality depends on diagnosis and trust, not branding. Parts sourcing and customer follow-up are key to repeat business.

bridge.ready_if: Fault Diagnosis at Functional level or above
bridge.gap_to_close: If at Entry: supervised repair practice on common faults closes the gap

opportunities.title: Tailoring / Stitching Operator
opportunities.honest_description: Accessible through home-based work, shared machine shops, or small neighborhood units. Demand stays steady for alterations, uniforms, and custom stitching. The strongest workers manage deadlines and customer fit well.

bridge.ready_if: Communication and Process Quality at Entry or above
bridge.gap_to_close: 2-4 months apprenticeship makes the entry path practical

opportunities.title: Construction Helper / Finishing Worker
opportunities.honest_description: Entry-level construction roles are common around urban expansion zones and housing growth corridors. Work is physical and project-based, with inconsistent pay between projects. Reliability and willingness to learn matter a lot.

bridge.ready_if: Process Quality and Operational Organization at Entry level or above
bridge.gap_to_close: On-site orientation is usually enough for first roles

opportunities.title: Ride-Share / Delivery Rider
opportunities.honest_description: Platform delivery and ride work continues to expand in large cities. Earnings depend on vehicle access, fuel costs, and platform ratings. The most reliable workers communicate clearly and keep schedules tight.

bridge.ready_if: Communication and Operational Organization at any level
bridge.gap_to_close: Driver onboarding and phone-based route management are the main steps

opportunities.title: Technical Training Pathway / Vocational Certificate
opportunities.honest_description: A vocational certificate can make informal skill visible to employers and training providers. It is especially useful when the worker already does the task but lacks formal proof. The goal is legibility, not just learning.

bridge.ready_if: Any skill level — this is a development pathway
bridge.gap_to_close: No prerequisite. Prior work experience can count in some institutes.
bridge.training_option: TEVTA / NAVTTC route — varies by province

opportunities.title: Street Food / Small Catering Operator
opportunities.honest_description: A common entry point for youth and families, especially near transport hubs and dense neighborhoods. Demand is stable, but hygiene, timing, and low waste management decide the margin. Micro-capital is usually the main barrier.

bridge.ready_if: Communication and Process Quality at Entry or above
bridge.gap_to_close: Food safety and stock discipline raise success rates quickly
